prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with CBT access; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Psychological therapies are widely integrated in many health systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: CBT (exposure-based) and SSRIs; group CBT programs common in some countries
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for CBT in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad psychotherapy availability and guideline-based treatment
